Do you want me to reschedule Event A (id 5), which looks like the dental check-up? If so, please provide:
1) The clinic's email address to add as a participant (I will add them and then reschedule).
2) Any custom message you want included in the notification email (otherwise I'll use the default reschedule notification).

Once you confirm and provide the clinic email, I will add the clinic to the event (if not already present), reschedule it to start 2024-05-20 10:00 and keep the original duration, and notify you and the clinic by email.
